signals.headline: Global Context:** J
signals.raw:
Global Context:** J.P. Morgan's 2026 global inflation forecast projects core CPI at 2.8% globally, with an expectation that the Bank of Korea will remain on a "prolonged hold" given inflation nearing 2%[5].

However, none of these appear to be **breaking news** announced in the past hours. The South Korea inflation data from March 2026 would be weeks old by mid-April. The search results lack times
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.raw:
I cannot identify breaking news or market-moving announcements from these search results that would have occurred at or near the current date of April 15, 2026, 1:07 AM UTC.

The most recent concrete data in the search results are:

signals.headline: South Korea:** Annual inflation rose to **2
signals.raw: South Korea:** Annual inflation rose to **2.2% in March 2026**, up from 2.0% in the previous two months[1]. The Bank of Korea raised its inflation outlook for 2026 to 2.2% from 2.1% and held its policy rate steady at 2.5%[1].
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.headline: Germany:** No current 2026 data provided; only historical comparisons showing Germany's debt-to-GDP ratio was revised do
signals.raw: Germany:** No current 2026 data provided; only historical comparisons showing Germany's debt-to-GDP ratio was revised downward by 1.2 percentage points[2].

signals.headline: Pakistan proposes new US-Iran peace talks as Trump and JD Vance hint at ceasefire progress | YES | HIGH confidence** [3]
signals.raw:
Pakistan proposes new US-Iran peace talks as Trump and JD Vance hint at ceasefire progress | YES | HIGH confidence** [3][2]

Trump stated "we've been called by the other side" and "they want to work a deal," while Vance said negotiations with Iran "did make some progress," signaling potential resolution to the seven-week Middle East war via talks possibly in Pakistan over the next two days.[3][2]
